# SEWWA.com

SEWWA.com provides free web development and SEO tools for developers, designers, and marketers.

## Tools

- [Schema Generator](https://www.sewwa.com/schema-generator/) — Generate JSON-LD structured data schemas for SEO
- [Color Palette Generator](https://www.sewwa.com/color-palette/) — Create, convert, and manage CSS color palettes

## Blog

### SEO

- [The 2026 AI SEO Checklist: Rank in the AI Search Era](https://www.sewwa.com/blog/ai-seo-checklist-2026/)
